name: figma
description: Figma integration — read design context, turn frames into code, and create or edit designs via the official Figma Dev Mode MCP, with Figma's official skills.

interface.shortDescription: Design-to-code + edit Figma, with official skills
interface.longDescription: Connect the official Figma Dev Mode MCP server to read design context (layout, variables, components), generate accurate code, and create or edit designs directly in your Figma account (use_figma). Bundled with Figma's official skills that guide each workflow.
